About our Rockville care

Home care built for Rockville families.

Rockville families trust Vitalis HealthCare because we combine real clinical expertise with the kind of warm, personal attention that only a local agency can offer. We're not a franchise. We're a Maryland-licensed home care agency with deep roots in Montgomery County — and we understand the needs of Rockville's diverse and growing senior population.

Rockville has one of the most active senior populations in Maryland. With major medical centers nearby, families often need help transitioning a loved one home from the hospital. We coordinate directly with hospital discharge teams to make that transition as smooth as possible. As a BCHD-contracted agency, our standards meet Montgomery County's highest benchmarks for care quality.

We serve families in North Rockville, Twinbrook, Veirs Mill, King Farm, Fallsgrove, and Downtown Rockville.

Joint Commission
Gold Seal certified agency
BCHD
Montgomery County contracted
VA Approved
Serving Rockville veterans & spouses

What we offer in Rockville

Every level of care, under one trusted roof.

We focus on three core services — so every client gets expert, well-supervised care, not a stretched generalist agency trying to do everything at once.

Companion Care
Someone to be there

Real conversation, shared errands, engagement, and the steady, friendly presence that keeps your loved one connected to life — and not lonely or isolated.

Personal Care
Help with daily life, done with dignity

Bathing, dressing, grooming, and mobility assistance — professional, respectful, and delivered in a way that preserves your loved one's independence and self-esteem.

Skilled Nursing
Clinical care at home

Registered nurses providing wound care, medication management, health monitoring, and post-surgical support — hospital-quality care without leaving the comfort of home.

★★★★★

“I like that they have good caregivers. They've helped with little things that make a real difference every day. I like that they are understanding when I call in. They always take the time to listen.”

B. Davis · Rockville, MD

Common questions

What Rockville families ask us most

Every family's situation is different — and we're happy to answer questions specific to yours. Call or WhatsApp us any time. No obligation, no pressure.

Call 240.716.6874WhatsApp Us
Do you serve all of Rockville, MD?

Yes — we serve all Rockville neighborhoods including Twinbrook, King Farm, Fallsgrove, North Rockville, and Veirs Mill. We also serve areas along Route 355 and the Pike corridor.

Can you start care the same week we call?

In most cases, yes. We typically begin care within 24–48 hours of an initial consultation. For hospital discharges or urgent situations, we work faster. Contact us as early as possible so we can prepare.

Do you work with Shady Grove Medical Center?

We regularly coordinate with hospital discharge planners in the Rockville and Gaithersburg corridor to help families bring loved ones home safely after a hospital or rehab stay.

Does Medicare pay for home care in Rockville?

Medicare covers certain skilled services — physical therapy, occupational therapy, speech therapy — when ordered by a doctor. For non-medical home care, Medicaid Waiver, VA benefits, or Long-Term Care Insurance typically apply. We'll help you figure out what works for your situation.

Are your Rockville caregivers background-checked and trained?

Every single caregiver goes through a full criminal background check, professional certification verification, and our in-house training program before they ever enter a client's home. Our Clinical Manager oversees all care delivery.

Ready to get started in Rockville?

Call us, WhatsApp us, or fill out a short form. We'll answer your questions and arrange a free care consultation — usually the same day.

Request a Free ConsultationCall 240.716.6874WhatsApp Us

Vitalis HealthCare Services, LLC

A family-owned, Maryland-licensed home care agency serving Silver Spring and communities across Montgomery County, Baltimore County, and Anne Arundel County. Our mission: improve quality of life for our clients in the comfort of their homes.
